tests.name: Low interaction risk is not red
High interaction risk is red only at high end
Red heat guidance says do not exercise
tests.detail:
100% heat risk

Very high predicted risk

Do not exercise or attend the park under these conditions. Move your dog to a cool, shaded and ventilated place with water. Seek veterinary help promptly if heat-stress signs app
